headline: Should Investors Buy Old Dominion Stock Post Dividend Hike?
summary: Consistent efforts to reward its shareholders through dividend payments and share repurchases highlight the financial strength of ODFL.

headline: The Market Just Got Riskier -- And I Couldn't Be More Bullish
